name: crybot-telegram
description: Unified CryBot Telegram service with modular structure

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/bot/registerCommands.js && node --check src/workers/scanner.js && node --check src/services/balanceScanner.js && node --check src/chains/evm.js && node --check src/chains/ton.js && node --check src/chains/aptos.js
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run validate && npm run audit && npm run scanner
scripts.start:safe: npm run validate && npm run audit && npm run start
